languages.text: "Знаешь, а мне понравилось быть законником. Мы с тобой отлично сработались, а?"
"You know, I have rather enjoyed upholding the law. You and I make a good team, no?"
languages.original_text: "Знаешь, а мне понравилось быть законником. Мы с тобой отлично сработались, а?"

traits.locale_text: "You know, I have rather enjoyed upholding the law. You and I make a good team, don't you think?"
"You know, I have rather enjoyed upholding the law. You and I make a good team, don't you think?"
"You know, I have rather enjoyed upholding the law. You and I make a good team, no?"
"You know, I have rather enjoyed upholding the law. You and I make a good team, no?"
"You know, I have rather enjoyed upholding the law. You and I make a good team, no?"
"You know, I have rather enjoyed upholding the law. You and I make a good team, no?"

languages.text: «¿Sabe? Me ha gustado esta experiencia de salvaguardar la ley. Hacemos buen equipo, ¿no le parece?».
languages.original_text: "You know, I have rather enjoyed upholding the law. You and I make a good team, no?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Sabe? Me ha gustado esta experiencia de salvaguardar la ley. Hacemos buen equipo, ¿no le parece?».

languages.text: “老实说，我还挺喜欢维护法律的。咱们两个配合得相当不错，是吧？”
languages.original_text: "You know, I have rather enjoyed upholding the law. You and I make a good team, no?"

traits.locale_text: “老实说，我还挺喜欢维护法律的。咱们两个配合得相当不错，是吧？”

languages.text: « Ce fut un plaisir pour moi que d'appliquer la loi. Nous formons une bonne équipe, vous et moi, vous ne trouvez pas ? »
languages.original_text: "You know, I have rather enjoyed upholding the law. You and I make a good team, no?"

traits.locale_text: « Ce fut un plaisir pour moi que d'appliquer la loi. Nous formons une bonne équipe, vous et moi, vous ne trouvez pas ? »

languages.text: 「{mf|俺|私}は法律を守ることをかなり楽しんでいる。君と{mf|俺|私}はいいチームだ、そう思わないか？」
languages.original_text: "You know, I have rather enjoyed upholding the law. You and I make a good team, no?"

traits.locale_text: 「{mf|俺|私}は法律を守ることをかなり楽しんでいる。君と{mf|俺|私}はいいチームだ、そう思わないか？」

languages.text: "Kanunları uygulama çok hoşuma gitti. Sizinle iyi bir takım olmadık mı, ne dersin?"
languages.original_text: "You know, I have rather enjoyed upholding the law. You and I make a good team, no?"

traits.locale_text: "Kanunları uygulama çok hoşuma gitti. Sizinle iyi bir takım olmadık mı, ne dersin?"

languages.text: "Es hat Spaß gemacht, für das Gesetz einzutreten. Wir beide sind ein gutes Team, oder?"
languages.original_text: "You know, I have rather enjoyed upholding the law. You and I make a good team, no?"

traits.locale_text: "Es hat Spaß gemacht, für das Gesetz einzutreten. Wir beide sind ein gutes Team, oder?"
